description: MCP tool definitions for Push Chain operations. Each entry is a candidate MCP tool ready for Model Context Protocol integration — includes inputs, safety metadata, and mapping to the corresponding SDK method and workflow.
migration_note: v1.0.0: root was a bare array. v1.0.0+ wraps in object — access via .candidates[]. Change mcp-candidates.json[N] → mcp-candidates.json.candidates[N].

candidates.purpose: Returns the list of chains supported by Push Chain for universal transactions.

inputs.name: network
inputs.description: The Push Chain network (TESTNET or MAINNET). Defaults to TESTNET if not specified.

candidates.return_type: Array of supported chain identifiers in CAIP-10 format (e.g., 'eip155:11155111', 'solana:EtWTRABZaYq6iMfeYKouRu166VU2xqa1')
candidates.notes: Chain list is derived from SDK constants. No RPC call required.

candidates.purpose: Initializes a PushChainClient from a UniversalSigner or UniversalAccount for read/write or read-only operations.

inputs.name: signer_or_account
inputs.description: A UniversalSigner for full capabilities or UniversalAccount for read-only mode.

inputs.name: network
inputs.description: Push Chain network to connect to (TESTNET or MAINNET).

inputs.name: rpc_urls
inputs.description: Custom RPC URLs mapped by chain IDs. Uses defaults if not provided.

inputs.name: block_explorers
inputs.description: Custom block explorer URLs mapped by chain IDs.

inputs.name: print_traces
inputs.description: When true, logs internal trace information for debugging.

candidates.notes: This is the entry point for all Push Chain operations. Must be called before any transaction or signing.

candidates.purpose: Estimates the gas cost for a universal transaction before execution.

inputs.name: push_chain_client
inputs.description: An initialized PushChainClient instance.

inputs.name: to
inputs.description: Target address or address+chain object for external chain execution.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Native value to send in smallest unit (uPC for Push Chain).

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: ABI-encoded calldata or multicall array.

inputs.name: funds
inputs.description: Assets to move as part of the transaction.

candidates.return_type: Estimated gas cost object with breakdown by chain
candidates.notes: status: undocumented. Fee estimation appears to happen internally during sendTransaction (progress event SEND-TX-02-01/02), but no standalone public method is documented. This is inferred from transaction lifecycle.

candidates.purpose: Constructs a universal transaction payload without executing it.

inputs.name: to
inputs.description: Target address (Push Chain) or address+chain object (external chain).

inputs.name: from
inputs.description: When set, uses CEA on that chain as execution origin (Route 3).

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Native value in smallest unit.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Encoded calldata or multicall batch.

inputs.name: funds
inputs.description: Assets to move atomically with execution.

candidates.notes: status: inferred. The SDK accepts tx objects directly in sendTransaction. No separate build method is documented, but the tx structure is well-defined.

candidates.purpose: Executes a universal transaction on Push Chain or supported external chains.

inputs.name: push_chain_client
inputs.description: An initialized PushChainClient with signing capabilities.

inputs.name: to
inputs.description: Plain address for Push Chain (Route 1), or {address, chain} for external chain (Route 2).

inputs.name: from
inputs.description: Forces CEA on specified chain as origin (Route 3).

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Native value to send in smallest unit.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: ABI-encoded calldata or multicall array.

inputs.name: funds
inputs.description: Assets to move atomically.

inputs.name: progress_hook
inputs.description: Callback for transaction lifecycle updates.

candidates.return_type: Transaction response with hash, receipt, and execution status
safety_risks: Executes contract calls that could have irreversible effects
candidates.notes: Core transaction method. Routes determined automatically by to/from fields. Requires user signature.

candidates.purpose: Resumes tracking any universal transaction by hash and origin chain. Works independently of sendTransaction — for session restore, backend polling, or monitoring any stored tx.

inputs.name: push_chain_client
inputs.description: An initialized PushChainClient instance.

inputs.name: tx_hash
inputs.description: Transaction hash or signature on the origin chain.

inputs.name: options.chain
inputs.description: Chain where the tx was originally submitted. Defaults to CHAIN.PUSH_TESTNET_DONUT.

inputs.name: options.progress_hook
inputs.description: Callback invoked at each tracking step.

inputs.name: options.wait_for_completion
inputs.description: true = wait for confirmation (default); false = return after first status check.

inputs.name: options.advanced.polling_interval_ms
inputs.description: Poll interval in ms (default 2000, min 500).

inputs.name: options.advanced.timeout
inputs.description: Max wait ms before timeout error (default 60000).

inputs.name: options.advanced.rpc_urls
inputs.description: Custom RPC URLs for status queries.

candidates.return_type: UniversalTxResponse — same shape as sendTransaction response, including Push Chain and external-chain execution details
candidates.notes: Use options.chain when tracking txs that originated on external chains (Ethereum, Solana, etc.). Use waitForCompletion:false for a snapshot without blocking.

candidates.purpose: Signs an arbitrary message using the universal signer.

inputs.name: push_chain_client
inputs.description: An initialized PushChainClient with signing capabilities.

inputs.name: message
inputs.description: The message to sign.

safety_risks: Signatures can authorize actions if misused
Phishing risk if message content not validated

candidates.purpose: Retrieves chain configuration including RPC URLs, chain IDs, and network parameters.

inputs.name: chain
inputs.description: The chain identifier to get configuration for.

inputs.name: network
inputs.description: Network context (TESTNET or MAINNET).

candidates.return_type: Chain configuration object with RPC URLs, chain ID, native token info
candidates.notes: Documented at /docs/chain/setup/chain-config/. Configuration is primarily static from SDK constants.

candidates.purpose: Returns deployed contract addresses for Push Chain infrastructure (UG, UEAFactory, etc.).

inputs.name: network
inputs.description: The Push Chain network to get addresses for.

inputs.name: chain
inputs.description: Optional chain filter for chain-specific gateway contracts.

candidates.return_type: Object containing contract addresses keyed by contract name

candidates.purpose: Reads state from a contract on Push Chain or supported external chains.

inputs.name: push_chain_client
inputs.description: An initialized PushChainClient instance (read-only sufficient).

inputs.name: contract_address
inputs.description: The contract address to read from.

inputs.name: abi
inputs.description: Contract ABI for decoding.

inputs.name: function_name
inputs.description: The view/pure function to call.

inputs.name: args
inputs.description: Arguments to pass to the function.

inputs.name: chain
inputs.description: Target chain. Defaults to Push Chain if not specified.

candidates.return_type: Decoded return value from the contract call
candidates.notes: Documented at /docs/chain/build/reading-blockchain-state/. Uses standard EVM call under the hood.

candidates.purpose: Computes the deterministic Universal Executor Account address from a Universal Origin Account.

inputs.name: uoa_address
inputs.description: The origin account address (e.g., Ethereum address, Solana pubkey).

inputs.name: uoa_chain
inputs.description: The chain of the origin account.

inputs.name: network
inputs.description: Push Chain network context.

candidates.notes: status: inferred. UEA derivation is deterministic and happens during client initialization. The getter is documented but standalone derivation function may not be public.

candidates.purpose: Generates a block explorer URL for a transaction hash.

inputs.name: push_chain_client
inputs.description: An initialized PushChainClient instance.

inputs.name: tx_hash
inputs.description: The transaction hash.

inputs.name: chain
inputs.description: Target chain. Defaults to Push Chain.

candidates.return_type: Full URL string to the transaction on block explorer
candidates.notes: Documented in Initialize Push Chain Client section. Also has listUrls() method.

candidates.purpose: Queries IUEAFactory on Push Chain to identify whether an address is a UEA and recover the origin chain and wallet address.

inputs.name: address
inputs.description: The address to look up (e.g. msg.sender from a Push Chain contract call).

candidates.return_type: { chainNamespace: string, chainId: string, owner: bytes, isUEA: boolean }
candidates.notes: Call IUEAFactory(0x00000000000000000000000000000000000000eA).getOriginForUEA(addr). Solidity or ethers.js. isUEA=false means native Push Chain EOA. owner is hex bytes — bs58-decode for Solana. Documented in agents/skills/push-contracts/SKILL.md section 1.

candidates.purpose: Generates Solidity code to call UGPC.sendUniversalTxOutbound() from a Push Chain contract to execute calldata on an external chain via the contract's CEA.

inputs.name: target_chain
inputs.description: Target external chain (e.g. eip155:11155111 for Ethereum Sepolia).

inputs.name: target_address
inputs.description: Contract address on the external chain to call.

inputs.name: calldata
inputs.description: ABI-encoded calldata to execute on the external chain.

inputs.name: token
inputs.description: PRC20 token to bridge. address(0) = no bridge, payload only.

inputs.name: amount
inputs.description: Amount of PRC20 to bridge. 0 if token is address(0).

candidates.return_type: void (emits cross-chain event consumed by TSS)
candidates.notes: UGPC at 0x00000000000000000000000000000000000000C1. msg.value must cover relay fee. gasLimit: 0 recommended (auto-estimate). Contract CEA is msg.sender on external chain. Documented in agents/skills/push-contracts/SKILL.md section 2.

candidates.purpose: Generates Solidity code for a contract on an external chain to call the Universal Gateway (UG) and trigger execution on a Push Chain contract.

inputs.name: source_chain
inputs.description: The chain where this contract is deployed (determines which UG address to use).

inputs.name: push_chain_target
inputs.description: Target contract address on Push Chain.

inputs.name: calldata
inputs.description: ABI-encoded calldata to execute on the Push Chain target.

candidates.return_type: void (relayed by TSS to Push Chain)
candidates.notes: IUniversalGateway.sendUniversalTx(bytes recipient, bytes payload, address token, uint256 amount) payable. UG addresses: Eth Sepolia 0x05bD7a3D18324c1F7e216f7fBF2b15985aE5281A, Arb Sepolia 0x2cd870e0166Ba458dEC615168Fd659AacD795f34, Base Sepolia 0xFD4fef1F43aFEc8b5bcdEEc47f35a1431479aC16, BNB Testnet 0x44aFFC61983F4348DdddB886349eb992C061EaC0. On Push Chain msg.sender = caller's UEA. Documented in agents/skills/push-contracts/SKILL.md.
